channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pamela Anderson and Aerie Team Up to Promote Authentic, AI-Free Fashion Campaign
item.description: Pamela Anderson has collaborated with fashion brand Aerie to advocate for authenticity and resist the rise of artificial intelligence in advertising. According to People magazine, the partnership is p...

item.title: Heavy rains in Rungwe cause landslides killing 20 people
item.description: Mbeya region, especially Rungwe District, has suffered tragic landslides caused by heavy rains and strong winds early Wednesday. The death toll has now reached 20 people, including two children from K...

item.title: US Public Opinion Turns Against Iran War Amid Midterm Elections
item.description: As the war with Iran enters its fourth week, new surveys indicate a clear shift in American public opinion. Majority of Americans are not happy with President Trump's handling of the conflict, with 61...

item.title: FIFA Series Mini-Tournaments Help Teams Gain International Experience
item.description: Di FIFA Series na one global football development competition wey FIFA organize, im goal na to give national teams chance to get more proper international match experience outside di normal big tourna...

item.title: Explosions near Pakistan Embassy in Tehran, All Diplomats Safe
item.description: On Thursday evening, explosions were reported close to the Embassy of Pakistan and the residence of the ambassador in Tehran's Pasdaran district. Diplomatic sources confirmed that all Pakistani staff ...

item.title: How Hollywood’s Reflections of the Past Mirror Today’s Geopolitical Realities
item.description: Busani Ngcaweni’s opinion piece examines Hollywood’s curious ability to foreshadow real-world events through its portrayals of history. The writer observes that films such as Dr. Strangelove, A Beauti...

item.title: Federal Constitutional Court clarifies its constitutional authority over Supreme Court precedents
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has clarified that it is not unconditionally bound by the Supreme Court’s earlier judgements, saying that Pakistan’s constitutional framework, after the 27th Ame...

item.title: NASA Announces SR-1 Freedom, a Nuclear-Powered Spacecraft Designed to Deliver Skyfall Helicopters to Mars in 2028
item.description: On March 24, 2026, NASA announced an ambitious new project called Space Reactor 1 (SR-1) Freedom — an interplanetary spacecraft powered by a fission reactor. This reactor will generate around 20 kilow...

item.title: Affordable cultural travel alternatives to the UAE for South Africans
item.description: With travel to the UAE currently discouraged due to unrest in the Middle East and rising global fuel costs inflating airfares, many South Africans are seeking alternative destinations that offer rich ...

item.title: FCC temporarily suspends Peshawar ATC trial over Radio Pakistan attack citing political concerns
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has ordered a stay on the proceedings of the Anti-Terrorism Court-III (ATC) in Peshawar concerning the May 2023 attack on Radio Pakistan Peshawar. The decision c...

item.title: Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of March 27, 2026
item.description: GMA Integrated News provided live updates on the continuing conflict in the Middle East as of March 27, 2026. The coverage focused on the rising tensions among key nations—including Iran and the Unite...

item.title: Patient from Punjab Institute of Mental Health taken into custody after driving ambulance to Shahdara Hospital
item.description: LAHORE: In a very unusual incident, a patient of Punjab Institute of Mental Health (PIMH), Rehanul Haq, who has been under treatment in the Special Medical Ward since 2022, drove away one of the insti...

item.title: PTI rejects government allegations over Kasim Khan’s UNHRC speech and GSP+ status
item.description: The federal and Punjab information ministers, Attaullah Tarar and Azma Bokhari, accused Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) leaders Kasim Khan (son of former Prime Minister Imran Khan) and Zulfi Bukhari of...

item.title: Pakistan Responds to Jaishankar’s Undiplomatic Remarks Over Mediation Role
item.description: On 26th March 2026, Indian External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar made controversial remarks about Pakistan’s role in mediating indirect peace talks between Iran and the United States. He used a dero...

item.title: Next Navigates Middle East Conflict, But Energy Price Shock Remains a Key Risk
item.description: Fashion retailer Next has reported strong full-year pre-tax profits of £1.16 billion, seemingly weathering the initial impact of the Middle East conflict. While an estimated £15 million in extra fuel ...

item.title: Tanzania Secures Fuel Reserves to Ensure Stable Supply Through 2026
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzania has made sure that the country will continue to have stable fuel supply by taking proactive steps and ordering additional reserves for the future. According to Dr James Matara...

item.title: African Nations Advocate for Greater Policy Flexibility in Global Trade Rules
item.description: African countries are increasingly calling for more flexibility within the global trade system, arguing that the current World Trade Organization (WTO) framework does not sufficiently support their de...

item.title: Urgent Need to Address Online Violence Against Women in Tanzania
item.description: Gender experts in Tanzania are urging urgent measures to tackle technology-facilitated gender-based violence (TFGBV) as digital access grows rapidly in the country. Speaking at a national symposium ca...

item.title: Iran signals possible pursuit of nuclear weapons amid wartime tensions with the US and Israel
item.description: Iran's new hardline government has intensified its rhetoric over the ongoing conflict with the United States, declaring that over one million fighters are prepared to resist a possible ground invasion...

item.title: US and Israel Continue Military Strikes on Iran Amid Diplomatic Talks
item.description: Amid ongoing diplomatic efforts and attempts to ease tensions in the Middle East, US and Israeli forces continue airstrikes on Iran. Areas including Tehran’s Fatimid and Pasdaran neighbourhoods, where...
